nasb.text: Then I will cause your enemies to bring it Into a land you do not know; For a fire has been kindled in My anger, It will burn upon you.”

esv.text: I will make you serve your enemies in a land that you do not know, for in my anger a fire is kindled that shall burn forever.”

cnv.text: 我必使你在你不認識的地方， 服事你的仇敵； 因為我的怒火燃燒起來， 要燒滅你們。”

ccb.text: 把你们掳到陌生的地方。我的怒火要烧灭你们。”
